scripts.dev: concurrently "cd api && symfony server:start --port=8000 --no-tls" "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd api && composer install && cd ../web && bun install
scripts.setup:api: cd api && composer install && php bin/console doctrine:database:create && php bin/console doctrine:schema:create && php bin/console doctrine:fixtures:load -n
